name: Coty Inc.
description: Coty Inc. is one of the world's largest beauty companies, with an iconic portfolio of brands across fragrance, color cosmetics, and skin and body care. Coty is the global leader in fragrance and holds a prominent position in prestige and mass beauty markets. The company's products are sold in over 130 countries and territories, featuring renowned brands such as CoverGirl, Max Factor, Rimmel, Sally Hansen, Calvin Klein, Gucci, Hugo Boss, and Tiffany & Co.
